name: Guide for Conducting Risk Assessments
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: Guide for Conducting Risk Assessments. NIST publication NIST.SP.800-30r1.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the public domain in the United States per Section 105 of the US Copyright Act.

current_extraction.notes: Applied the generic section extractor to 800-30 r1: 164 headings captured, 20 with identifiers via the numeric/statute/pillar/chapter patterns. Per-section appendix-table parsing (where applicable, especially for 800-30 r1's assessment-scale tables) is a follow-up that would emit a separate per-table CSV alongside the section table.

notes: Auto-generated bulk metadata. Title/description from marker meta + README. Fields like Wikipedia URL, published date, and category-specific relations were not populated; enrich as needed.

extraction_history.notes: Extracted via marker (PDF -> markdown) before the SecID-mirror reorg. Structured CSV/JSON extraction is TODO for most NIST publications.
